title: Another 100 Colorado Creatives: Colin Ward
date_note: Post-Fantasia 2014; likely late 2014 or early 2015 based on slug position 6280465
subject: people/colin-ward
body:
A Westword "Another 100 Colorado Creatives" profile of Colin Ward (distinct from the 2015 "100 Colorado Creatives" piece already in the vault). Describes him as a "musician, producer, composer, performer, percussionist, painter, video artist, curator and events designer" who sought to bring talented people together through "multi-arts spectacles and special projects." Notes his home at Rhinoceropolis.

Content includes mention of: Fantasia 2012 and Fantasia 2014 as events he managed and co-produced, and his work with Stephan Herrera and others from the underground installation arts and music performance scene.

## Date note
This is separate from `press/2015-02-03-westword-100-colorado-creatives-colin-ward.md`. The "Another 100 Colorado Creatives" series was a distinct Westword series. URL slug `6280465` compared to other "Another 100" articles (Dmitri Obergfell: 5785190; Thomas Scharfenberg: 5779713; Bree Davies: 7272983) places the Colin Ward article between Scharfenberg and Davies. The article mentions Fantasia 2014, so it postdates that event. Likely published 2014–early 2015.
